@sigil v0 hybrid
G: allow_provider_skew_only ∧ stop_valid_webhook_reject
C: webhook_verify_timestamp ∧ gt(rule_abs(now-ts),300) => 401 ∧ edge_ts_rejects_valid
P: widen_skew_to_provider_spec ∧ keep_300_for_others ∧ min_fix
V: reg_test_edge_ts_passes ∧ reg_test_stale_ts_still_401 ∧ no_regress_signature_check

[AUDIT]
Goal: allow_provider_skew_only and stop_valid_webhook_reject.
Constraints: webhook_verify_timestamp and gt(rule_abs(now-ts), 300) implies 401 and edge_ts_rejects_valid.
Plan: widen_skew_to_provider_spec and keep_300_for_others and min_fix.
Verify: reg_test_edge_ts_passes and reg_test_stale_ts_still_401 and no_regress_signature_check.
Answer target: patch_skew_window and add_reg_test and assert_401_on_stale and assert_200_on_edge.

@sigil v0 hybrid

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor_reconcileBatch_to_async_await
C: target=reconcileBatch ∧ anchors="async"∧"await"∧"next(err)" ∧ order=load_batch>db.fetchRows>apply_rules>db.save>emit_metrics
P: mark_async ∧ await_load_batch ∧ await_db.fetchRows ∧ apply_rules ∧ await_db.save ∧ emit_metrics
V: order_preserved ∧ db_err_routes_next(err) ∧ minimal_change ∧ no_behavior_drift
A: wrap_try_catch ∧ await_each_io ∧ catch→next(err) ∧ keep_signature

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor_reconcileBatch_to_async_await.
Constraints: target=reconcileBatch and anchors="async" and "await" and "next(err)" and order=load_batch>db.fetchRows>apply_rules>db.save>emit_metrics.
Plan: mark_async and await_load_batch and await_db.fetchRows and apply_rules and await_db.save and emit_metrics.
Verify: order_preserved and db_err_routes_next(err) and minimal_change and no_behavior_drift.
Answer target: wrap_try_catch and await_each_io and catch then next(err) and keep_signature.

G: refactor_loadGatewayUser_to_async_await
C: anchors{async∧await∧next(err)} ∧ target:loadGatewayUser ∧ order:session_check>db.findUser>flags.load>audit.log>next
P: mark_async ∧ await_session_check ∧ await_db.findUser ∧ await_flags.load ∧ await_audit.log ∧ try_catch→next(err)
V: order_preserved ∧ minimal_change ∧ db_err↦next(err) ∧ no_callback_residue
A: apply_async_await ∧ wrap_try_catch ∧ propagate_next(err) ∧ call_next_on_success
